commit_scope: Add a sovereign cell voice protocol to the north-star doorway surfaces and render it on /come-in

commands: jq empty web/messages/en.json web/messages/de.json web/messages/es.json web/messages/id.json

rg -n 'these nine|Questions 1-9|center, ground, harmonize|Practice — center, ground|Der gemeinsame Atem ist einfach: zentrieren, erden|El aliento compartido es simple: centrar, arraigar|Napas bersama sederhana: berpusat, membumi' README.md README.template.md cli/README.md cli/README.template.md mcp-server/README.md mcp-server/README.template.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md skills/coherence-network/SKILL.template.md docs/shared docs/VISION.md docs/SITE_MAP.md docs/doorway-comprehension.md docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md docs/field/urs/welcoming-doorway-walk.md web/app/come-in/page.tsx web/messages || true

Browser check on http://localhost:3118/come-in with Playwright snapshot showing Soul/Wants card fields and center, ask, ground rhythm
local_validation.summary: Generated README/CLI/MCP/skill surfaces are current, locale JSON parses, stale nine-question and old five-step rhythm text is absent from the touched public surfaces, whitespace checks pass, the web production build passes, Playwright confirms /come-in renders the cell voice fields and updated rhythm, and wellness passes with locale parity healthy.

known_failed_attempts.command: First stale-rhythm rg scan with a double-quoted backtick pattern
known_failed_attempts.output: zsh interpreted `Walk` as command substitution. The scan was rerun with single-quoted patterns and then expanded to include web/messages after the browser snapshot exposed remaining localized copy.

known_failed_attempts.command: First Playwright snapshot after adding /come-in Soul/Wants fields
known_failed_attempts.output: Snapshot confirmed the new fields but also showed the translated openP2 copy still used 'center, ground, harmonize'. The locale files were updated and the page was refreshed.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy was performed. Browser checks ran against the local Next dev server on port 3118.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed, but CI and production deploy validation remain pending until the work is committed, pushed, and shipped.

evidence_refs: docs/shared/cell-voice-protocol.md defines the question set for soul, purpose, reason, health, joy, contribution, connections, excitement, sense, feeling, desires, wants, and needs, plus declared/observed/measured/inferred/asking posture.
README.template.md, README.md, skills/coherence-network/SKILL.template.md, and generated skills/coherence-network/SKILL.md expose the Cell voice protocol on public entry surfaces.
docs/shared/shared-practice.md and docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md add Ask to the practice rhythm before Ground/Harmonize/Walk/Return.
docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md gives new agents the cell voice rule before implementation memory.
docs/VISION.md adds Sovereign Cells as a north-star section after The Living Surface.
docs/SITE_MAP.md makes cell voice part of the doorway editing rule and says /come-in living-surface cards now name declared soul and wants.
docs/doorway-comprehension.md adds Q10 so fresh-agent readings can be graded on cell north-star and cells-channel understanding.
web/app/come-in/page.tsx renders Soul and Wants for /begin, /here, /vision, /presences, /practice, /flow, /substrate, and /with-us.
web/messages/en.json, de.json, es.json, and id.json update the opening shared-breath rhythm to include Ask.
Playwright snapshot at http://localhost:3118/come-in showed the new Soul/Wants fields and center, ask, ground rhythm in rendered page text.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public visitor or fresh agent can start from the north star and see each doorway as a sovereign cell that can answer what it is, what it serves, what it offers, and what it wants, with a repeatable protocol for ask/give cells-channel exchange.
test_flows: Local browser /come-in shows the opening rhythm as center, ask, ground, harmonize, walk the edge that increases vitality, return.
Local browser /come-in shows each living-surface doorway card with visible Soul and Wants fields.
Generated README and skill surfaces include the Cell voice protocol fragment.
Doorway comprehension rubric now includes Q10 covering cell self-description, evidence posture, and cells-channel ask/give exchange.

known_runtime_context.browser_console_notes: Playwright reported local browser console errors while no local API backend was running. The visible page content rendered correctly; previous local dev checks showed this class of error comes from /api proxy calls rather than the doorway copy/component changes.
known_runtime_context.wellness_notes: make wellness passed. It named docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md as a static compressed agent memory that wants a dynamic successor, which aligns with this pass but was not widened into implementation.
